title: rubus austrosinensis
intro: Rubus austrosinensis, also known as the Taiwan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to East Asia. This plant is rich in anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Studies have shown that Rubus austrosinensis has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cardiovascular disease, cancer, and neurodegenerative diseases, providing various health benefits. Rubus austrosinensis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
